data_source_summary: t1_output.json (carry_for_later_tests.T1.1 = C, T1.5 = Yes); Official Notification No. 26-A-2020/CGN dated 21.05.2020; Chhattisgarh Economic Survey 2024-25; Outcome Budget 2025-26; CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25

Q30.r: RGKNY is a Direct Benefit Transfer income-support scheme paying farmers per quintal of crop produced on their private agricultural land. The scheme's official notification (No. 26-A-2020/CGN) and all operational guidelines contain no replenishment, regeneration, or renewal obligation of any kind. There is no afforestation ratio, no water recharge mandate, no rotational grazing protocol, no seed-bank renewal obligation, no knowledge-transmission component, no NRM spend requirement, and no commons resource whose sustainability the scheme is designed to protect. The scheme design is exclusively a cash transfer mechanism with administrative verification. T4.1 = No → AUTOMATIC T4 FAIL (Near-SOC Structural, requires redesign).
Q30.src: Official Notification No. 26-A-2020/CGN dated 21.05.2020; Chhattisgarh Economic Survey 2024-25 ('Processing: Automated through state agriculture portal. Annual fund transfer to farmer accounts through e-governance system.'); Outcome Budget 2025-26

Q31.r: Carried T1.1 = 'C' (private agricultural land). T1.1 ≠ 'E', therefore the RhoRatio track (Track A) applies. Q32 is answered; Q33 is set to SKIP.

Q32.v: <<UNVERIFIED: ρ is undefined and inapplicable. RGKNY operates exclusively on private agricultural land (T1.1 = C). There is no commons resource from which extraction occurs; there is no commons replenishment mandate. Both annual extraction from commons (numerator) and annual replenishment mandated by scheme (denominator) are zero for any commons resource — yielding an indeterminate 0/0 ratio. ρ cannot be computed for a scheme with no commons resource. T4 has already failed at Q30 (T4.1 = No). Even if ρ could be estimated, the absence of any replenishment rule means the denominator is structurally zero, confirming FAIL.>>
Q32.calc: <<UNVERIFIED: extraction from commons = 0 (no commons resource); replenishment mandated by scheme = 0 (no replenishment obligation); ρ = 0/0 = undefined>>
Q32.interp: FAIL — ρ is indeterminate/inapplicable; no commons resource exists; T4 fails at Q30 regardless
Q32.src: Official Notification No. 26-A-2020/CGN dated 21.05.2020; Outcome Budget 2025-26
